title: Plasplug Cf424 Plasterboard Fixing (Card 100)
description: Product Description 100 x Regular duty, easy to use plasterboard fixings for general use in plaster board. For general work into plasterboard, these fixings are just made for the job. With a longer grip barrel on this special pack, they're also ideal for plasterboard that's skim plastered or decorated. Manufacturer's Description Plasplug Plasterboard Fixings Provides a modern alternative to the traditional mechanical toggle bolts. Screw size No.8 only. Hole size No.12 Drill (6.5mm,1/4). Pack content 100
